title: smoke-hot spotted indulgent british suet Spotted Dick
description: A traditional Yorkshire dessert featuring suet, plums, and spices, smoked to perfection and served in a pandan leaf wrap.

ingredients.name: all-purpose flour
ingredients.notes: for dusting the pandan leaf wrap

ingredients.name: unsalted butter
ingredients.notes: for greasing the pandan leaf wrap

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the suet, flour, dried plums, brown sugar, ground ginger, smoked paprika, and salt (if using).
Add the water to the suet mixture and mix until a dough forms.
On a lightly floured surface, knead the dough for 5-7 minutes, until it becomes smooth and pliable.
Cut the pandan leaves into 12-inch lengths and grease each leaf with a little unsalted butter.
Place a small ball of the suet mixture onto the center of each pandan leaf and fold the leaf over to form a triangle.
Tie the seam of each triangle with kitchen twine and place the Spotted Dick on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake the Spotted Dick for 30 minutes, or until it is golden brown and puffed.
Remove the Spotted Dick from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Serve the Spotted Dick warm, with a drizzle of honey or cream (optional).
